title: Russian recruits survive just 20-30 minutes on Ukraine frontlines: CIA chief explains why
summary_full: Russian soldiers face a brief battlefield life expectancy of minutes.  AI-powered drones have become specialized, low-cost killing machines on the front.  Ukraine's mastery of drone warfare acts as a significant equalizer in the conflict.  This technological advantage has helped Ukraine hold off Russia's superior force.  Both sides have experienced substantial casualties since the invasion began.
